patch.value: GH-589: pm next --assignee X answers from anonymous-caller perspective and pm claim conflates assignment with claim

GitHub issue #589, two conflations breaking multi-agent coordinator queries: (a) pm next --assignee X without --author X relegates X's own claimable work to held_by_others (empty ready/recommended) — asking about X should adopt X's perspective or the envelope should say why rows were held out; (b) pm claim on an assigned-but-never-claimed item errors 'already claimed by <assignee>' though no claim ever happened — assignment and claim are distinct lifecycle facts and the recovery hint should name assignment takeover explicitly.

pm next --assignee X surfaces X's claimable work as ready/recommended (or discloses the perspective rule in the envelope); claim on assigned-unclaimed items distinguishes assignment from claim in error text and recovery hints; contract docs define assignee-vs-author-vs-claim semantics; regression coverage for both conflations
